targets.rawSql: SELECT 'smoke' AS metric, count(*)::int AS value FROM strat_smoke.bets WHERE status='open' UNION ALL SELECT 'reversion', count(*)::int FROM strat_reversion.bets WHERE status='open'

SELECT 'smoke' AS metric, COALESCE(sum(entry_notional),0)::float AS value FROM strat_smoke.bets WHERE status='open' UNION ALL SELECT 'reversion', COALESCE(sum(entry_notional),0)::float FROM strat_reversion.bets WHERE status='open'

SELECT 'smoke' AS metric, COALESCE(sum(realized_pnl),0)::float AS value FROM strat_smoke.bets WHERE exit_ts::date = (now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::date UNION ALL SELECT 'reversion', COALESCE(sum(realized_pnl),0)::float FROM strat_reversion.bets WHERE exit_ts::date = (now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::date

SELECT 'smoke' AS metric, count(*)::int AS value FROM strat_smoke.bets WHERE status<>'open' AND exit_ts::date=(now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::date UNION ALL SELECT 'reversion', count(*)::int FROM strat_reversion.bets WHERE status<>'open' AND exit_ts::date=(now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::date
SELECT exit_ts AS time, sum(realized_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY exit_ts) AS "smoke" FROM strat_smoke.bets WHERE realized_pnl IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(exit_ts) ORDER BY exit_ts
SELECT exit_ts AS time, sum(realized_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY exit_ts) AS "reversion" FROM strat_reversion.bets WHERE realized_pnl IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(exit_ts) ORDER BY exit_ts
SELECT date_bin('15 minutes', entry_ts, TIMESTAMPTZ '2026-01-01') AS time, count(*)::int AS "smoke placed" FROM strat_smoke.bets WHERE $__timeFilter(entry_ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT date_bin('15 minutes', entry_ts, TIMESTAMPTZ '2026-01-01') AS time, count(*)::int AS "reversion placed" FROM strat_reversion.bets WHERE $__timeFilter(entry_ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT entry_ts, symbol, side, round(entry_notional::numeric,0) AS notional, status, round(realized_pnl::numeric,2) AS pnl, exit_ts FROM strat_smoke.bets ORDER BY entry_ts DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT entry_ts, symbol, side, round(entry_notional::numeric,0) AS notional, round(signal::numeric,3) AS signal, status, round(realized_pnl::numeric,2) AS pnl, exit_ts FROM strat_reversion.bets ORDER BY entry_ts DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Win rate & avg PnL per bet (closed, today)

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'smoke' AS strategy, count(*) AS closed, count(*) FILTER (WHERE realized_pnl > 0) AS wins, round(100.0*count(*) FILTER (WHERE realized_pnl>0)/NULLIF(count(*),0),1) AS win_pct, round(avg(realized_pnl)::numeric,3) AS avg_pnl, round(sum(realized_pnl)::numeric,2) AS total_pnl FROM strat_smoke.bets WHERE realized_pnl IS NOT NULL AND exit_ts::date=(now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::date UNION ALL SELECT 'reversion', count(*), count(*) FILTER (WHERE realized_pnl>0), round(100.0*count(*) FILTER (WHERE realized_pnl>0)/NULLIF(count(*),0),1), round(avg(realized_pnl)::numeric,3), round(sum(realized_pnl)::numeric,2) FROM strat_reversion.bets WHERE realized_pnl IS NOT NULL AND exit_ts::date=(now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::date
